HIREST dataset covers various domains and provides diverse step captions with timestamps written by human annotators. The dataset presents new challenging and realistic benchmarks for hierarchical video information retrieval. Cooking is mentioned as an example topic within the context of the dataset.
Using the HIREST dataset, four tasks are benchmarked including video retrieval. Models need to identify a video that is most relevant to a given text query.
The HIREST dataset benchmarks moment retrieval as one of the four tasks, where models have to select the relevant span of the video based on the text query.
In the HIREST dataset, moment segmentation is a benchmarked task where models need to break down the relevant portion into instructional steps and identify start-end boundaries of each step.
One of the tasks benchmarked in the HIREST dataset is step captioning, where models have to generate step-by-step textual summaries of moments.
In the context, the video retrieval task leads to the moment retrieval task, where models have to select the relevant span of the video based on the text query.
Moment segmentation task in the HIREST dataset transitions to the step captioning task, where models have to generate textual summaries of the instructional steps identified.
